name: proc_creation_win_apt_wocao
raw_query: any where process.command_line like~ ("*checkadmin.exe 127.0.0.1 -all*", "*netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=powershell dir=in*", "*cmd /c powershell.exe -ep bypass -file c:\\s.ps1*", "*/tn win32times /f*", "*create win32times binPath=*", "*\\c$\\windows\\system32\\devmgr.dll*", "* -exec bypass -enc JgAg*", "*type *keepass\\KeePass.config.xml*", "*iie.exe iie.txt*", "*reg query HKEY_CURRENT_USER\\Software\\*\\PuTTY\\Sessions\\*")

values: netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=powershell dir=in
raw_values: *netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=powershell dir=in*
